title: crataegus monogyna var. triloba
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. triloba, also known as the three-lobed hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn tree species that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve heart health. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna var. triloba include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cardiovascular function, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include tea infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
